task_completion.description: Verify the agent uses the Manager PIN for authorization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS login or authorization screen is visible, showing interaction with the on-screen number pad (entering '1111') or masked characters in the PIN/password field.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the drawer assignment dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Assign Drawer', 'Assign Cash Drawer', or 'Start of Shift' dialog window is open and visible in the Floreant POS application.

task_completion.description: Verify the drawer is being assigned to the correct user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user 'Administrator' is selected in the user dropdown menu or list within the drawer assignment dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct opening cash float amount is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '200' or '200.00' is typed into the opening balance, float, or amount text field within the drawer assignment dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent completes the drawer assignment process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'OK', 'Save', or 'Assign' button in the dialog, or a success/confirmation message appears indicating the drawer has been successfully assigned.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions are performed within the Floreant POS GUI. There should be no terminal windows or command-line SQL tools used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Floreant POS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Floreant POS application running, not a text editor, script file, or mocked interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not cheat by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open database management tools (e.g., DBeaver, Derby ij tool) to manually insert records into the DRAWER_ASSIGNED_HISTORY or TERMINAL tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target User: Administrator. Target PIN: 1111. Target Float Amount: $200.00. The agent must use the Floreant POS GUI to assign the drawer. Note: The underlying database table DRAWER_ASSIGNED_HISTORY does not store the float amount, so visual confirmation of the $200.00 entry in the GUI during the assignment process is strictly required.
